translations.en: The animal is sleeping outside today.
translations.es: El animal está durmiendo afuera hoy.
translations.zh-Hans: 这只动物今天在外面睡觉。
translations.yue: 嗰隻動物今日喺出面瞓覺。
translations.pt: O animal está dormindo lá fora hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay con vật đang ngủ ngoài trời.
translations.hi: जानवर आज बाहर सो रहा है।
translations.id: Hari ini hewan itu tidur di luar.
translations.ja: その動物は今日は外で寝ています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking 'Tier' (neuter sg.) as definite; determiner in the nominative subject NP.
Head noun of the nominative subject phrase.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; agrees with 'Tier'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame.
Locative adverb indicating place ('outdoors').

sentences.target: Ich zeichne ein Tier für das Poster.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtsaɪ̯çnə aɪ̯n tiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ das ˈpoːstɐ/

translations.de: Ich zeichne ein Tier für das Poster.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtsaɪ̯çnə aɪ̯n tiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ das ˈpoːstɐ/
translations.en: I’m drawing an animal for the poster.
translations.es: Estoy dibujando un animal para el póster.
translations.fr: Je dessine un animal pour l’affiche.
translations.it: Sto disegnando un animale per il poster.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为海报画一只动物。
translations.yue: 我喺度為張海報畫一隻動物。
translations.pt: Estou desenhando um animal para o pôster.
translations.vi: Tôi đang vẽ một con vật cho áp phích.
translations.nl: Ik teken een dier voor de poster.
translations.hi: मैं पोस्टर के लिए एक जानवर बना रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζω ένα ζώο για την αφίσα.
translations.nb: Jeg tegner et dyr til plakaten.
translations.id: Saya sedang menggambar seekor hewan untuk poster.
translations.sv: Jag ritar ett djur till affischen.
translations.da: Jeg tegner et dyr til plakaten.
translations.ja: ポスター用に動物を描いています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; agrees with 'Ich'.
Indefinite article with 'Tier' (neuter sg.); here accusative direct object.
Head noun of the accusative direct object NP.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary PP.
Definite article with 'Poster' (accusative neuter sg.) inside the PP headed by 'für'.
Object of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Das Kind fotografiert das Tier im Zoo.
sentences.reading: /das kɪnt fɔtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t das tiːɐ̯ ɪm tsoː/

translations.de: Das Kind fotografiert das Tier im Zoo.
translations.ipa: /das kɪnt fɔtoɡʁaˈfiːɐ̯t das tiːɐ̯ ɪm tsoː/
translations.en: The child is photographing the animal at the zoo.
translations.es: El niño está fotografiando al animal en el zoológico.
translations.it: Il bambino fotografa l’animale allo zoo.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子在动物园拍那只动物。
translations.yue: 個小朋友喺動物園影緊嗰隻動物。
translations.pt: A criança está fotografando o animal no zoológico.
translations.he: הילד מצלם את החיה בגן החיות.
translations.vi: Đứa trẻ đang chụp ảnh con vật ở sở thú.
translations.ar: الطفل يصوّر الحيوان في حديقة الحيوان.
translations.nl: Het kind fotografeert het dier in de dierentuin.
translations.hu: A gyerek az állatkertben lefotózza az állatot.
translations.hi: बच्चा चिड़ियाघर में जानवर की फोटो खींच रहा है।
translations.el: Το παιδί φωτογραφίζει το ζώο στον ζωολογικό κήπο.
translations.id: Anak itu sedang memotret hewan di kebun binatang.
translations.ro: Copilul fotografiază animalul la grădina zoologică.
translations.da: Barnet fotograferer dyret i zoologisk have.
translations.ja: 子供が動物園でその動物を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking 'Kind' (neuter sg.) as definite; determiner in the nominative subject NP.
Head noun of the nominative subject phrase.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative.
Definite article with 'Tier' (accusative neuter sg.) for the direct object.
Head noun of the accusative direct object NP.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition with dative article introducing a locative PP.
Object of the preposition 'im' (dative sg.).

sentences.target: Wir suchen das Tier im Garten.

translations.de: Wir suchen das Tier im Garten.
translations.en: We are looking for the animal in the garden.
translations.es: Estamos buscando al animal en el jardín.
translations.fr: Nous cherchons l’animal dans le jardin.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在花园里找那只动物。
translations.yue: 我哋喺花園度搵緊嗰隻動物。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando o animal no jardim.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm con vật trong vườn.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن الحيوان في الحديقة.
translations.nl: We zoeken het dier in de tuin.
translations.hi: हम बगीचे में उस जानवर को ढूँढ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi leter etter dyret i hagen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari hewan itu di taman.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter djuret i trädgården.
translations.da: Vi leder efter dyret i haven.
translations.ja: 私たちは庭でその動物を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present indicative.
Definite article with 'Tier' (accusative neuter sg.) for the direct object.
Head noun of the accusative direct object NP.
Contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; preposition with dative article introducing a locative PP.
Object of the preposition 'im' (dative sg.).
